title: Document container auth when `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR` is not defined
body:
#5319 updated docs by referncing `containers-auth.json` for more information, but that page doesn't document container auth when `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR` is not defined.

Document the fallback in `contianers-auth.json` when `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR` is not defined.

comments.body: @wulfgarpro Would you like to open a PR to fix this ?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
